title: rubus × megalanthus
intro: Rubus × megalanthus, also known as the yellow Himalayan raspberry, is a hybrid plant species within the Rosaceae family, resulting from the cross between Rubus armeniacus and Rubus fruticosus. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain microorganisms and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × megalanthus include its potential to alleviate inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
